commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete mpijob uccl-ep-perf-uccl --ignore-not-found --wait=true 2>&1; kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete configmap uccl-ep-perf-uccl-script --ignore-not-found 2>&1; kubectl -n yanxi-validation delete pod uccl-probe --ignore-not-found 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-uccl.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage2/mpijob-perf-uccl.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation get pods -o wide 2>&1'
